name: Stick War 2: Chaos Retaliation
description:
Stick War 2 Chaos Retaliation is a mod that continues the story of Stick War 2 : Order Empire under the perspectives of the Chaos Empire, creating a unique campaign that expands further upon the gameplay potential of the hit web flash game sequel to it's predecessor. Play as the General of the Chaos Empire, training and honing their skills for years in secret by your commanders, and fight your way through the Order Empire and other surrounding threats to restore the power of your empire.

Summary of the mod :

- Take control of the brutal and aggressive Chaos Empire. Command packs of Crawlers, suicidal maniac Bombers, fearless Juggerknights, deadly Deads, massive Giants, the shadow flight of the Eclipsor and the mystical horrors of Medusa's abilities to overwhelm the strength of your enemies.
- Play through 14 handcrafted levels each with their own set of challenges, mechanics and gimmicks. Battle against the empire you once took control, and various more side enemies, veteran foes and overwhelming bosses to keep you on your guard.
- Research upgrades belonging to the Chaos Empire that will help you in terms of passiveness or through powerful abilities.
- Get a chance to re-experience scenery of maps with a different customized tone in them.
- Added several recognizable, remixed or new music from notable composers to freshen up the chaotic and relentless gameplay.
- Enter the Endless Ops endless zone. Test your skills against wave after wave of enemy units as every level is randomly generated with a number of waves required to survive. Use starting boosts to help leverage the randomness of the unforgiving game mode and see how far you can go.
- Tons of QOL features, various bug fixes and more (with the help of close friends and modders) to retain the old and perhaps outdated, but providing a new modern insight to the potential of the acclaimed best stick war game.
